name: chr22_22q11_22_SDF2L1_SD
description: 22q11.22 SD cluster around SDF2L1/IGLL5/LRP5L. Contains short inverted SD pairs of 10-40 kb at 96-98% identity that occasionally mediate rare 22q11.22 microdeletions. Overlaps the proximal end of the IGL light-chain locus (cross-ref).

architecture.internal_structure: Inverted SD pairs around SDF2L1/IGLL5; partial overlap with IGL locus duplicons.
